reason: Pre-modification snapshot: Fix Call Google Ads: read headers from Build API Request output (populated from tenant_metadata params). Fallback to correct GOOGLE_ADS_LOGIN_CUSTOMER_ID var.

parameters.jsCode: const input=$input.first().json;const v2=input._v2||$('Build API Request').first().json._v2||{};const statusCode=input.statusCode||null;const headers=input.headers||{};const body=input.body!==undefined?input.body:input;if(statusCode!==null&&typeof statusCode==='number'){if(statusCode>=200&&statusCode<300)return[{json:{ok:true,data:body,error:null}}];const errorBody=body;let errorMsg='API returned error';if(typeof errorBody==='object'&&errorBody!==null){errorMsg=errorBody.error?.message||errorBody.error?.error_description||errorBody.error_description||errorBody.message||(errorBody.error&&typeof errorBody.error==='string'?errorBody.error:'')||JSON.stringify(errorBody).slice(0,500);}else if(typeof errorBody==='string'){errorMsg=errorBody.slice(0,500);}let errorType='api_error';if(statusCode===401||statusCode===403)errorType='auth_error';else if(statusCode===400)errorType='schema_error';else if(statusCode===404||statusCode===422)errorType='logic_error';else if(statusCode>=500)errorType='system_error';return[{json:{ok:false,data:null,error:{type:errorType,message:errorMsg,status:statusCode,details:{status_code:statusCode,domain:v2.domain,action:v2.action,response_headers:Object.keys(headers).join(', '),request_id:headers['request-id']||headers['x-request-id']||null,raw:JSON.stringify(errorBody).slice(0,500)}}}}];}if(input.error||(input.statusCode&&input.statusCode>=400))return[{json:{ok:false,data:null,error:{type:'api_error',message:input.message||input.error?.message||input.error||'API call failed',details:{status_code:input.statusCode||500,domain:v2.domain,action:v2.action,raw:JSON.stringify(input).slice(0,500)}}}}];if(input.ok===false)return[{json:input}];return[{json:{ok:true,data:input,error:null}}];

const input=$input.first().json;const data=input.body||input;const headers=input.headers||{};const secret=headers['x-handler-secret']||data._handler_secret||'';const EXPECTED=$vars.GW_HANDLER_INTERNAL_SECRET;if(secret!==EXPECTED&&headers['x-handler-secret']!==EXPECTED){const isWebhook=!!input.headers;if(isWebhook)return[{json:{error:true,message:'Unauthorized handler call',status_code:403}}];}if(data._handler_secret)delete data._handler_secret;return[{json:data}];
